title: calcCroparea — calcCroparea
text: Returns harvested areas individual crops FAOSTAT.              Total harvested areas can lower higher arable              land multicropping fallow land.              Rice areas distributed flooded LUH areas. Additional FAOSTAT              rice areas distributed based country shares.

title: calcCroparea — calcCroparea
code: calcCroparea(   sectoral = "kcr",   physical = TRUE,   cellular = FALSE,   irrigation = FALSE )

title: calcCroparea — calcCroparea
text: sectoral "area_harvested" returns croparea aggregated FAO products, "ProductionItem" unaggregated ProdSTAT items, "FoodBalanceItem" Food Balance Sheet categories, "kcr" MAgPIE items, "lpj" LPJmL items physical TRUE sum crops agrees cropland area per country cellular TRUE: calculates cellular MAgPIE crop area magpie croptypes. Crop area LUH3 crop types (c3ann, c4ann, c3per, c4per, cnfx) mapped MAgpIE crop types using "FAO2LUH2MAG_croptypes" intermediate step via harvested areas FAO weight area within specific LUH crop type divide MAgPIE crop types. irrigation true: cellular areas returned separated irrigated rainfed (see setup calcLUH3)

title: calcCroparea — calcCroparea
text: areas individual crops FAOSTAT weight

title: calcCroparea — calcCroparea
text: Ulrich Kreidenweis, Kristine Karstens, Felicitas Beier

title: calcCropareaLandInG — calcCropareaLandInG
text: function uses total physical area              crop-specific harvested area data LandInG              calculate crop-specific physical harvested              areas considering special rules              allocation perennial annual crops.

title: calcCropareaLandInG — calcCropareaLandInG
code: calcCropareaLandInG(   sectoral = "kcr",   physical = TRUE,   cellular = FALSE,   cells = "magpiecell",   irrigation = FALSE,   selectyears = "all",   lpjml = c(natveg = "LPJmL4_for_MAgPIE_44ac93de", crop =     "ggcmi_phase3_nchecks_bft_e511ac58"),   climatetype = "GSWP3-W5E5:historical" )

title: calcCropareaLandInG — calcCropareaLandInG
text: sectoral "kcr" MAgPIE items, "lpj" LPJmL items physical TRUE sum crops plus fallow land (calcFallowLand) agrees physical cropland readLandInG(subtype = physical) cellular TRUE: calculates cellular crop area magpie croptypes. Option FALSE (yet) available. cells Switch "magpiecell" (59199) "lpjcell" (67420) irrigation true: cellular areas returned separated irrigated rainfed selectyears extract certain years data lpjml LPJmL version used determine multiple cropping suitability climatetype Climate scenario historical baseline "GSWP3-W5E5:historical" used determine multiple cropping suitability

text: MAgPIE object cropareas

text: David Hoetten, Felicitas Beier

title: calcFallowLand — calcFallowLand
text: Calculates fallow land grid cell level, based physical cropland extend harvested area output LandInG data. formula "fallow land = max( physical cropland area - harvested cropland area, 0)" used. Due multiple cropping, harvested cropland area can greater non-fallow land area even greater physical cropland area. Thus, results can considered rough estimate fallow land area.

title: calcFallowLand — calcFallowLand
text: cellular TRUE cellular outputs.

title: calcGrowingPeriodMonths — calcGrowingPeriodMonths
text: Calculates gridcell-specific months              growing conditions favorable crop growth              based monthly grass GPP

title: calcGrowingPeriodMonths — calcGrowingPeriodMonths
text: selectyears Years returned lpjml LPJmL version required respective inputs: natveg crop climatetype Switch different climate scenarios historical baseline "GSWP3-W5E5:historical" minThreshold Threshold monthly grass GPP classified growing period month Unit threshold gC/m^2. Default: 100gC/m^2 Note: default value chosen based LPJmL version 5       reflect multiple cropping suitability shown GAEZ-4.       update LPJmL5 regards grass management may       require adjustment threshold.

title: calcLPJmL4 — calcLPJmL4
text: Handle LPJmL data time behaviour (averaging, approximation, harmonizing baseline)

title: calcLPJmL4 — calcLPJmL4
code: calcLPJmL4(   version = "LPJmL4",   climatetype = "CRU_4",   subtype = "soilc",   subdata = NULL,   time = "raw",   averaging_range = NULL,   dof = NULL,   harmonize_baseline = FALSE,   ref_year = "y2015",   limited = TRUE,   hard_cut = FALSE,   selectyears = "all" )

title: calcLPJmL4 — calcLPJmL4
text: version Switch LPJmL4 LPJmL4 climatetype Switch different climate scenarios (default: "CRU_4") subtype Switch different lpjml input specified readLPJmL subdata Switch data dimension subitems time average, spline raw (default) averaging_range just specify time=="average": number time steps average dof just specify time=="spline": degrees freedom harmonize_baseline FALSE (default) nothing happens, baseline specified data harmonized baseline (ref_year ) ref_year just specify harmonize_baseline != FALSE : Reference year limited just specify harmonize_baseline != FALSE : TRUE limited approached used hard_cut just specify harmonize_baseline != FALSE : use hard cut instead multiplicative factor selectyears defaults years available

title: calcLUH2v2 — calcLUH2v2
text: Integrates LUH2v2 landuse-dataset

title: calcLUH2v2 — calcLUH2v2
code: calcLUH2v2(   landuse_types = "magpie",   irrigation = FALSE,   cellular = FALSE,   cells = "lpjcell",   selectyears = "past_til2020" )

title: calcLUH2v2 — calcLUH2v2
text: landuse_types magpie: magpie landuse classes, LUH2v2: original landuse classes flooded: flooded areas reported LUH irrigation true: areas returned separated irrigated rainfed, false: total areas cellular true: dataset returned 0.5 degree resolution cells Switch "magpiecell" (59199) "lpjcell" (67420) NOTE: setting also affects sums country level! selectyears years returned (default: "past")

title: calcLUH3 — calcLUH3
text: Prepares LUH3 historic landuse-dataset usage MAgPIE.

title: calcLUH3 — calcLUH3
code: calcLUH3(   landuseTypes = "magpie",   irrigation = FALSE,   cellular = FALSE,   yrs = seq(1965, 2020, 5) )

title: calcLUH3 — calcLUH3
text: landuseTypes magpie: magpie landuse classes, LUH3: original landuse classes irrigation true: areas returned separated irrigated rainfed, false: total areas (irrigated + rainfed) cellular true: dataset returned 0.5 degree resolution, false: return country-level data yrs years returned

title: calcLanduseInitialisation — calcLanduseInitialisation
text: Calculates cellular MAgPIE landuse initialisation area.              Data FAO forestry used split secondary forest pool              LU2v2 dataset forestry secd_forest.

title: calcLanduseInitialisation — calcLanduseInitialisation
code: calcLanduseInitialisation(   cellular = FALSE,   nclasses = "seven",   cells = "lpjcell",   selectyears = "past_til2020",   input_magpie = FALSE )

title: calcLanduseInitialisation — calcLanduseInitialisation
text: cellular cellular (TRUE) country-level/regional (FALSE) data? country-level vs regional data: remember set "aggregate" FALSE. nclasses options either "six", "seven" "nine". "six" includes original land use classes "crop", "past", "forestry", "forest", "urban" "" "seven" separates primary secondary forest includes "crop", "past", "forestry", "primforest", "secdforest", "urban" "" "nine" adds separation pasture rangelands, well differentiation primary secondary non-forest vegetation therefore returns "crop", "past", "range", "forestry", "primforest", "secdforest", "urban", "primother" "secdother" cells cellular TRUE: "magpiecell" 59199 cells "lpjcell" 67420 cells selectyears default "past" input_magpie applies area fix (set cells zero area minimal value disturb aggregating clusters)

title: calcLanduseInitialisation — calcLanduseInitialisation
text: List magpie object results country cellular level, weight cellular level, unit description.

title: calcLanduseInitialisation — calcLanduseInitialisation
text: Jan Philipp Dietrich, Benjamin Leon Bodirsky, Kristine Karstens, Felcitas Beier, Patrick v. Jeetze

title: calcMulticropping — calcMulticropping
text: calculates multiple cropping factor based area harvested,              physical cropland area (optionally fallow land).

title: calcMulticropping — calcMulticropping
text: extend_future TRUE factortype CI: cropping intensity factor calculated ratio     harvested physical area values one     indicate multicropping, one fallow land (default) MC: multiple cropping factor indicating areas     harvested one year calculated taking     fallow land account explicitly:     harvestedArea / (physicalArea - fallowLand)

title: calcMulticropping — calcMulticropping
text: List magpie objects results country level, weight country level, unit description.

title: calcMulticropping — calcMulticropping
text: Benjamin Leon Bodirsky, David Chen, Felicitas Beier

title: calcMulticroppingSuitability — calcMulticroppingSuitability
text: Calculates grid cells potentially suitable              multiple cropping activities rainfed irrigated conditions.              Calculation based length growing period determined              monthly grassland gross primary production (GPP).

title: calcMulticroppingSuitability — calcMulticroppingSuitability
code: calcMulticroppingSuitability(   selectyears,   lpjml,   climatetype,   suitability = "endogenous",   sectoral = "kcr" )

title: calcMulticroppingSuitability — calcMulticroppingSuitability
text: selectyears Years returned lpjml LPJmL version required respective inputs: natveg crop climatetype Switch different climate scenarios historical baseline "GSWP3-W5E5:historical" suitability "endogenous": suitability multiple cropping determined              rules based grass crop productivity "exogenous": suitability multiple cropping given              GAEZ data set sectoral "kcr" MAgPIE crops, "lpj" LPJmL crops
